summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM/Admin platform with SMS provider abstraction layer. All core functionality working correctly including authentication, dashboard, automation rules, communication templates, and multilingual support.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 201 status with success=false instead of 4xx error code when no providers configured
minor_issues.impact: Minor - API works correctly but status code could be more semantic

passed_tests: Dashboard KPI display (5 KPI cards showing correct data)
SMS providers status API (returns 0 providers as expected)
Automation rules API (9 rules including 4 no_answer workflow rules)
Communication templates API (7 templates: 4 SMS + 3 email)
Navigation to all sections (Ліди, Клієнти, Угоди, Депозити, Завдання, Команда, Налаштування)
